block_00: Learn to Make a Helpful Trading Checklist
block_01: While it may seem simple, a checklist is a powerful tool that can make your trading go even smoother. For example, it allows you to organize your mind, preventing rushed and costly decisions.
block_02: The best part about a checklist is that you can customize it to suit your personal trading style. Follow these tips to create a list that will take your trading to the next level.
block_04: 5 Trading Mistakes You Are Probably Making
block_05: Why make mistakes that you can easily avoid? This list of 5 extremely common trading sins will show you what bad habits to stay away from.
block_07: Call Options vs. Put Options — We Explain the Difference
block_08: Should I choose Call or Put? What does it even mean? If you have ever asked yourself these questions, you will definitely find this article useful.
